prompt: Generate a cinematic ultra-realistic "Book A Couple" concept poster of the uploaded couple, standing inside the pages of a giant open vintage diary book. The diary is huge, old, realistic, with aged yellow brown pages and detailed vintage texture, distorted edges. The left page displays "Jun 02 Tuesday" in classic diary typography with English handwritten notes and calendar elements, hand drawn flowers. The right page displays "JUNE" with aesthetic handwritten romantic notes, hand drawn flowers, love shape. The thick book spine divides the couple naturally in the center. The man is wearing a stylish maroon shirt rolled up sleeve, black pants, and black shoe, leaning naturally against the left diary page with a calm cinematic expression. The woman is wearing the bright pink traditional saree with heavy golden embroidery, earrings, bangles, wristwatch, posing softly against the right diary page with elegant bridal expressions. Warm cinematic lighting, soft shadows, vintage brown aesthetic, dreamy storytelling atmosphere, ultra realistic photography, DSLR depth of field, realistic human proportions, emotional romantic mood, highly detailed diary pages, realistic paper texture, premium color grading. Maintain the both face exactly same as the uploaded photo. Aspect ratio 4:5
